work_unit: deep-audit: skills/prod-deploy deployment pipeline (13 JS files + SKILL.md + phases)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after audit-2026-07-03-012 fixes all merged. Triggered new full deep audit per DO A. Selected autonomous-studio/skills/prod-deploy as unaudited sensitive deployment path.
action: Read 13 JS source files (lib/5 + scripts/7 + extract-url), SKILL.md, phases/00+07 docs. Cross-module data flow analysis: CLI input → parseArgs → event-client/task-client/sunfire-client → HTTP API → side effects (audit-log, state transitions). Identified 14 findings (3H/4M/3L/4I). Wrote audit-2026-07-03-013.md. Populated audit-cycle-state derived_fixes with 11 pending entries (10 route-fix + 1 direction-shift). Appended 2 structural debts to structural-debt.md. Status → fix-in-progress.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-03-013.md written (14 findings, 11 derived fixes registered); audit-cycle-state.json status=fix-in-progress with pending_count=11; structural-debt.md appended SD-PD-001 and SD-PD-002
next_suggestion: 派生 PD-H001 fix (priority 1): resume-next-batch.js time gate clock-skew → use server time or local delta
派生 PD-H002 fix (priority 2): event-client terminal payload-only update add audit-log
派生 PD-M002 fix (priority 3): audit-log-helper ACTION_MAP add cli-json-parse-failed

audit_findings.finding: Time gate uses Date.now() vs server updated_at; clock skew can bypass or permanently block observation period
audit_findings.remediation: Use server-provided current time or record local_success_time at batch SUCCESS for delta comparison

audit_findings.finding: Terminal-state payload-only update path has no audit-log; observation_result append after deploy-complete is untraceable
audit_findings.remediation: Add writeAuditLog call in payload-only branch; add event-payload-append to ACTION_MAP

audit_findings.finding: poll-build and poll-pre-check spawn a1 CLI and drive deploy decisions with zero audit-log; DO B violation
audit_findings.remediation: Add audit-log at main() exit based on isTerminal/done; add pipeline_status_poll and precheck_poll actions to ACTION_MAP

audit_findings.finding: Dual credential env (CODE_PRIVATE_TOKEN + DEVOUT_TOKEN) coexistence silent; CODE wins without warning
audit_findings.remediation: Emit stderr WARN once when both env vars are set

audit_findings.finding: safeJsonParseCli calls writeAuditLog with unknown action cli-json-parse-failed; ACTION_MAP miss causes silent drop
audit_findings.remediation: Add cli-json-parse-failed to ACTION_MAP as input_validation medium

audit_findings.finding: Observation gate silently skipped when observation_result absent; agent may not see stderr WARN
audit_findings.remediation: Add --strict-observation flag / RESUME_REQUIRE_OBSERVATION env; when enabled, missing result → approved:false

audit_findings.finding: JSON parse error and network error homogenized to skipped:true; cannot distinguish API corruption from expected degradation
audit_findings.remediation: Differentiate SyntaxError (severity warning) from network error (severity info) in return object

audit_findings.finding: createEvent(finish) + updateTask non-atomic; updateTask failure leaves finish event but task still RUNNING
audit_findings.remediation: Reorder: updateTask first then createEvent; or add cross-validation in Phase 0 checkpoint recovery

audit_findings.finding: result||'success' coerces falsy values (empty string, 0) to success; masks real outcomes
parseInt(batch-index) NaN propagates to payload.batch_index; findBatchEvent never matches → duplicate events created
audit_findings.remediation: Add isNaN guard: exit(1) with error message on invalid batch-index

audit_findings.finding: extractIdFromLine regex \d{4,} matches timestamps/version numbers in a1 output; false ID extraction
audit_findings.remediation: Tighten regex to id[=:]\s*(\d+) or known column format; add stderr WARN on fallback match
